drug_identity.class: string — enum: NSAID | Corticosteroid | Antibiotic | Antiparasitic | Antifungal | Analgesic | Cardiac | Diuretic | Sedative | Antiemetic | GI Protectant | Anticonvulsant | Antidepressant | ACE Inhibitor | Bronchodilator | Immunosuppressant | Thyroid | Hormone | Antineoplastic Agent | Antiretroviral
drug_identity.source: string — enum: kr_vet | human_offlabel | foreign | unknown
drug_identity.off_label_note: string | null — only for human_offlabel source
drug_identity.dosage_form: string — enum: Tab | Inj | Cap | Susp | Drop | Oint | Topical | Ophthalmic

available_strengths.unit: string — e.g. mg | mg/kg | IU/kg | mcg/kg | EA

metabolism_and_clearance.primary_metabolic_organ: string — enum: Liver | Kidney | Mixed | Unknown
metabolism_and_clearance.clearance_organ: string — enum: Kidney | Liver | Biliary | Mixed

inhibitors: string — CYP enzyme this drug inhibits
inducers: string — CYP enzyme this drug induces
cyp_profile.pathway_evidence: string | null — note on metabolic pathway

metabolism_and_clearance.extra_information: string | add dog & cats specific information in here

organ_burden_logic.note: string — scoring methodology e.g. 'Score = sum of weights from triggered_keywords'

triggered_keywords: string — Paper's keyword that set this score
brain.index: integer — Paper's section index, -1 if not directly cited
brain.evidence: string — Korean or English evidence note

timing_profile.t_max_hr: float — hours to peak plasma concentration

drug_interactions.note: append more drug interactions as needed, each with drug name, severity (minor/moderate/major), mechanism keywords, and evidence note

drug_interactions.drug: string — interacting drug name or class e.g. 'Corticosteroids'
string — interacting drug name or class e.g. 'Corticosteroids'

additive_risks.nephrotoxic: boolean — additive renal load (triple whammy etc.)

species_flags.mdr1_sensitive: boolean — P-gp substrate, dangerous in MDR1-mutant breeds
species_flags.washout_period_days: integer — minimum days before switching (5 × half-life rule)

dosage_list.logic_type: string — enum: linear | weight_band | fixed | max_capped
dosage_list.value: string — dose as string to support ranges e.g. '0.1 - 0.2'
dosage_list.unit: string — enum: mg/kg | mcg/kg | IU/kg | ml/kg | mg | EA
dosage_list.route: string — enum: PO | IV | SC | IM | Eye | Ear | Top | Inh
dosage_list.frequency: string — enum: SID | BID | TID | QID | q8h | q12h | Monthly | PRN

renal_dose_adjustment.creatinine_threshold_dog_mg_dL: float | null — trigger creatinine for dogs
renal_dose_adjustment.creatinine_threshold_cat_mg_dL: float | null — trigger creatinine for cats
renal_dose_adjustment.adjustment_type: string — enum: reduce_dose | extend_interval | avoid | none
renal_dose_adjustment.adjustment_factor: float 0–1 | null — multiplier e.g. 0.5 = half normal dose

hepatic_dose_adjustment.applies: boolean — true only for NTI drugs with primary hepatic elimination
hepatic_dose_adjustment.alt_threshold_multiplier: float | null — e.g. 3.0 = ALT > 3× upper normal triggers this
hepatic_dose_adjustment.adjustment_type: string — enum: reduce_dose | monitor | avoid | none

match_terms: string — EMR condition strings that auto-trigger this e.g. 'CKD'
contraindications.action: string — enum: contraindicated | reduce_dose | monitor | avoid

section_1_2_10.highlights: string — key clinical highlights (Korean preferred for EMR display)

_data_quality.renal_adjustment_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none
_data_quality.hepatic_adjustment_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none
_data_quality.organ_burden_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none
_data_quality.ddi_source: string — enum: plumbs_direct | additive_class | cyp_derived | unknown
